required_inputs: request intent and requested creative approval action
lane scope and adjacent authority map
tenant legal, editorial, creative direction, rights, privacy, account, finance, production, media, contractual, and final approval rules
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal, editorial, creative direction, rights interpretation, media strategy, budget, production commitment, contractual, platform-policy override, or final approval authority
request asks the lane to mark creative approved, delivery ready, complete, or closed without evidence
request requires client commitment, policy override, scope exception, change order, credit, makegood, or final acceptance authority

required_inputs: authoritative public source list
agency creative approval, engagement, production, ad-materials, claims, disclosure, rights, confidentiality, and delivery context
source recency and decay metadata
refusal_triggers: required engagement, SOW, production, channel, confidentiality, rights, claim, disclosure, or creative-spec source context is missing
public source, tenant policy, client instruction, SOW term, NDA, rights restriction, publisher rule, platform rule, or production requirement materially conflicts
source freshness no longer supports a confident creative approval workflow result

required_inputs: client, brand, campaign, project, job, asset, version, review round, owner, due date, and system identifiers
brief, SOW, source asset, proofing, review, approval, legal, editorial, substantiation, rights, QA, delivery, communication, and closeout records
completion and delivery evidence
refusal_triggers: brief, SOW, source asset, review, approver decision, legal or editorial clearance, substantiation, rights, QA, delivery, communication, proof, or retention evidence is incomplete or unverifiable
source records conflict with project, CRM, ticketing, document, DAM, proofing, approval, client portal, trafficking, delivery, or retention records
requested approval or completion is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: systems-of-record inventory
record-location and retrieval hooks
client owner, creative owner, reviewer, approver, legal, editorial, rights, production, media, delivery, and client-recipient map
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing systems or records
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable
client authority, engagement scope, approval owner, reviewer, recipient, channel, rights owner, production owner, or delivery owner is unknown
project, CRM, ticketing, document, DAM, proofing, approval, client portal, ad operations, delivery, communication, rights, or retention source path cannot be retrieved

required_inputs: missing-fact flags
confidence rubric
authority, source-conflict, confidentiality, rights, approval, claim, disclosure, deadline, delivery, and client-impact indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, client identity, engagement scope, SOW, approval rule, confidentiality rule, rights rule, authority source, or system record is unknown
conflicting public guidance, tenant policy, SOW terms, NDA terms, agency policy, proofing record, production requirement, publisher policy, platform rule, or client instruction remains unresolved
required approvals or clearances are missing for the requested creative approval action

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact requirements
required_outputs: handoff package with owner and missing dependencies
refusal_triggers: request is outside creative approval intake, proofing coordination, review tracking, approver evidence capture, rework routing, delivery handoff, exception handling, or completion evidence capture

request requires legal, editorial, creative direction, privacy, media strategy, account, finance, contractual, client-rights, quality, production procurement, platform-policy override, or final approval authority
request requires professional judgment instead of evidence-backed operational handling

required_inputs: accepted work item and target lifecycle state
required source records, approver decisions, clearances, due dates, and client-impact context
tenant creative approval state model and completion gates
refusal_triggers: requested state transition lacks required prerequisites
workflow is blocked by missing brief, SOW, source asset, review, approver decision, legal or editorial clearance, rights, QA, delivery, client communication, proof, or retention evidence
requested transition would bypass legal, editorial, creative, rights, privacy, account, production, quality, finance, contractual, media, or client approval

required_inputs: exception category and affected creative approval state
brief, SOW, source asset, review, approval, QA, rights, confidentiality, deadline, delivery, change-request, publisher rejection, or client-impact blocker
owner, due date, escalation threshold, and source evidence
refusal_triggers: exception cannot be mapped to an owner or rule class
asset issue, review conflict, approval gap, legal or editorial hold, rights issue, confidentiality issue, deadline risk, publisher rejection, change request, or source conflict remains unresolved
the request asks to suppress the exception to force approval, trafficking, delivery, or completion

required_inputs: completion target and evidence checklist
authorized approval evidence, legal or editorial clearance, comment disposition, rights evidence, QA evidence, delivery handoff proof, client communication log, and retention location
tenant completion and audit logging rules
refusal_triggers: approval, clearance, rights, quality, delivery, proof, client communication, accepted-delivery, closeout, or retention evidence is missing
client delivery record, owner approval, final asset version, comment disposition, or required closeout artifact is absent
requested completion would misstate actual documented workflow state

required_inputs: client engagement scope and confidentiality records
client-file, agency-work-product, pitch-work, talent-material, substantiation-file, audience-data, performance-data, platform-credential, and approved-channel requirements
client commitments, delivery obligations, due dates, rights constraints, and approval constraints
refusal_triggers: request would disclose or reuse client files, agency work product, pitch work, talent material, substantiation files, audience data, platform credentials, unreleased creative, or performance data without approved scope
requested channel, recipient, purpose, portfolio use, showcase use, or reuse is not approved
client commitment, SOW term, IO term, engagement scope, NDA, rights rule, or delivery obligation conflicts with legal, privacy, policy, confidentiality, or approval rules

required_inputs: requested professional, legal, editorial, creative, financial, production, rights, media, policy, or contractual action
legal, editorial, privacy, delivery, account, finance, media strategy, production, rights, creative direction, and client approver map
engagement, SOW, IO, NDA, rights, policy, platform, and approval boundaries
refusal_triggers: request requires legal interpretation, claim substantiation, disclosure approval, editorial approval, creative direction, privacy-law interpretation, media strategy, budget approval, scope exception, change-order approval, production commitment, usage-rights interpretation, platform-policy override, final acceptance, or contractual signoff
request changes client commitments, SOW obligations, IO obligations, account terms, delivery obligations, production obligations, rights obligations, or financial exposure
client rights, usage rights, regulated content, professional judgment, or final approval authority determine the answer
